title: Easy Replant
description: Automatically replants crops when harvesting fully-grown crops. Lightweight, vanilla-friendly farming QoL mod.
body:
# Auto Replant Crops

Tired of manually replanting crops after every harvest?

Auto Replant Crops is a lightweight vanilla-friendly quality-of-life mod that automatically replants supported crops when harvesting fully-grown plants.

## Perfect for:

- survival worlds
- large farms
- multiplayer servers
- casual gameplay
- vanilla+ modpacks

The mod is designed to feel like a natural Minecraft feature while staying extremely lightweight and optimized.

## Features
- Automatically replants mature crops
- Preserves vanilla drops
- Works with Fortune enchantments
- Lightweight and optimized
- Multiplayer compatible
- Vanilla-friendly behavior
- Clean in-game configuration screen
- Mod Menu integration
- Cloth Config support
  
## Supported Crops
- Wheat
- Carrots
- Potatoes
- Beetroot
- Nether Wart
- Cocoa Beans
- Sweet Berry Bushes

## In-Game Config Screen

## Customize:

- enable/disable mod
- sounds
- particles
- crop support toggles

## Accessible through:

- Mod Menu

## Compatibility

### Works with:

- Fabric API
- Minecraft 1.21.4 -> 1.21.11
- Singleplayer
- Multiplayer servers
  
## Dependencies

### Required:

- Fabric API

### Optional:

- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config
